texto: The press has the power to stimulate people to clean up the environment prevent nuclear proliferation force crooked politicians out of office reduce poverty provide quality health care for all people and even to save the lives of millions of people as it did in Ethiopia in 1984. But instead we are using it to promote sex violence and sensationalism and to line the pockets of already wealthy media moguls.’ Dr Carl Jensen founder of Project Censored
explicacao: Citação de Ian Hargreaves sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The press has the power to stimulate people to clean up the environment prevent nuclear prolifera…” articula reflexao, journalism, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
